title: Oracle - Command in URI
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC WAF Security Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Web Application Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Load Balancer Access Logs') and (('Request URL' like '*cat%20/etc/passwd*' or 'Request URL' like '*/etc/passwd*' or 'Request URL' like '*ping -i*' or 'Request URL' like '*/usr/bin/id(*' or 'Request URL' like '*%2f%75%73%72%2f%62%69%6e%2f%69%64*' or 'Request URL' like '*phpinfo*' or 'Request URL' like '*%70%68%70%69%6e%66%6f%28%29*' or 'Request URL' like '*;id*' or 'Request URL' like '*%3b%69%64*' or 'Request URL' like '*/bin/bash -c*' or 'Request URL' like '*%2f%62%69%6e%2f%62%61%73%68%20%2d%63%27*' or 'Request URL' like '*/bin/bash*' or 'Request URL' like '*%2f%62%69%6e%2f%62%61%73%68*' or 'Request URL' like '*sleep(*' or 'Request URL' like '*%73%6c%65%65%70%28*' or 'Request URL' like '*curl*' or 'Request URL' like '*%63%75%72%6c*' or 'Request URL' like '*&dir*' or 'Request URL' like '*%26%64%69%72*' or 'Request URL' like '*& dir*' or 'Request URL' like '*%26%20%64%69%72*' or 'Request URL' like '*<script>*' or 'Request URL' like '*%3c%73%63%72%69%70%74%3e*' or 'Request URL' like '*eval(*' or 'Request URL' like '*%65%76%61%6c%28*' or 'Request URL' like '*exec(*' or 'Request URL' like '*%65%78%65%63%28*' or 'Request URL' like '*whoami*' or 'Request URL' like '*%77%68%6f%61%6d%69*' or 'Request URL' like '*wget*' or 'Request URL' like '*python*' or 'Request URL' like '*gcc*' or 'Request URL' like '*uname*' or 'Request URL' like '*systeminfo*' or 'Request URL' like '*%77%67%65%74*' or 'Request URL' like '*%70%79%74%68%6f%6e*' or 'Request URL' like '*%75%6e%61%6d%65*' or 'Request URL' like '*%73%79%73%74%65%6d%69%6e%66%6f*'))

ask_ai_prompts: Summarize the Microsoft Sentinel converted detection results and identify the highest-risk pivots.
